title: tsamad #6775
definition:
1) to bind, join, fasten
    1a) (Niphal) to join, join or attach oneself to
    1b) (Pual) to be fastened, be bound
    1c) (Hiphil) to combine, fit together, hitch up
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to bind, join, fasten
    1a) (Niphal) to join, join or attach oneself to
    1b) (Pual) to be fastened, be bound
    1c) (Hiphil) to combine, fit together, hitch up

    NASB:  to bind, join
